description: Public or operator-only status update on a relief campaign with optional metrics snapshot.
name: StatusUpdate

modules.description: Draft, publish, and announce status updates
modules.name: publishing

operations.description: Create or amend a draft update
operations.name: DRAFT_UPDATE
operations.template: Create or amend a draft update

operations.description: Edit title and/or body of an update
operations.name: EDIT_UPDATE
operations.reducer:
if (action.input.title) state.title = action.input.title;
if (action.input.body) state.body = action.input.body;
operations.template: Edit title and/or body of an update

operations.description: Publish an update with a metrics snapshot

errors.description: Title and body must be set before publishing
errors.name: MissingTitleOrBodyError

operations.name: PUBLISH_UPDATE
operations.template: Publish an update with a metrics snapshot

operations.description: Attach an external announcement (Twitter, Farcaster, blog post, etc.)
operations.name: ATTACH_ANNOUNCEMENT
operations.template: Attach an external announcement (Twitter, Farcaster, blog post, etc.)

operations.name: RETRACT_UPDATE
operations.reducer:
if (!state.publishedAt) throw new UpdateNotPublishedError('Update is not published');
state.publishedAt = null;
